title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Canara Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Canara Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Canara Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Canara Bank:
Canara Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank!
